description: Hazardous environment inspections in offshore rigs and refineries. Implement intrinsically safe drone operations, Optical Gas Imaging (OGI), and automated flare stack analysis.
learning_objectives: Understand oil and gas pipeline infrastructure, failure modes, and integrity management frameworks (PHMSA, API 1160)
Build AI models for corrosion detection, leak detection (OGI/thermal), third‑party encroachment, and cathodic protection anomalies
Create geospatial data pipelines for linear asset management and inspection history tracking
Deploy multi‑sensor detection pipelines on drones conducting BVLOS corridor inspections
Implement industrial communication protocols (MQTT, OPC UA) for integration with SCADA systems
Design BVLOS flight operations with detect‑and‑avoid, satellite link redundancy, and emergency protocols
Comply with PHMSA integrity management regulations, API standards, and aviation BVLOS waivers

modules.title: Optical Gas Imaging (OGI)
modules.description: Detect and quantify invisible methane and VOC leaks using specialized Mid-Wave Infrared (MWIR) cameras.
topics: Confined space navigation within pressure vessels
Deploying physics-informed neural networks for plume dispersion

capstone_project.name: Autonomous Pipeline Surveillance System
capstone_project.description: Build a drone system that conducts an autonomous BVLOS inspection of a 50 km simulated pipeline corridor, detecting gas leaks via OGI, corrosion via RGB/thermal, and third‑party encroachments. All anomalies are georeferenced to pipeline km posts, published to a simulated SCADA system via MQTT, and stored in a PostGIS pipeline database. Achieve <100 ms leak‑to‑alert latency and zero missed critical anomalies in a held‑out test scenario.
deliverables: OGI plume detection model (3D CNN, TensorRT optimized)
Pipeline GIS database with anomaly history
BVLOS flight plan with ADS‑B conflict avoidance

resources.name: PHMSA Pipeline Safety
resources.description: US Pipeline and Hazardous Materials Safety Administration regulations

resources.name: FLIR GF320 OGI Camera
resources.description: Reference OGI camera for methane and VOC detection

resources.name: API 1160 Pipeline Integrity Management
resources.description: Industry standard for managing system integrity of hazardous liquid pipelines

glossary.definition: Optical Gas Imaging. Thermal imaging technology to visualize and detect gas leaks.
Equipment certified as safe to use in explosive atmospheres.
